system.description: Grants the Hexslingin' aptitude and access to hex items. Roll hexslingin' using the hex's associated Trait die type vs. TN 5. On success draw 5 cards (+1/raise) from the Action Deck and form the best poker hand; the hand must meet the hex's minimum requirement. A Black Joker (or Red Joker with hexslingin' < 3) triggers a Backlash roll on the Extended Backlash Table (hnh p.101-102). A bust on the hexslingin' roll also triggers Backlash.
